scores.correctness_notes: All required fields present and correct: name, type, base, platforms, summary, description, containers, resources. Uses current base/platforms syntax. Misses the older bases format shown in gold standard but that is supplementary info about old versions, not a correctness error for the primary answer.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — optional field on relation endpoints is valid in charm metadata; charm-user, charm-entrypoint, charm-libs are all real charmcraft fields
